name: The Next Generation
overview: This fly-on-the-wall look at life in the Barça first team is specifically designed for fans who keep up to date with goings-on at the club via Barça One. It zooms in on the breakthroughs of players like Lamine Yamal and Pau Cubarsí, two 16-year-olds who showcase the amazing talent that comes out of the Barça youth system year after year. The film also takes a close look at the recoveries of Gavi and Alejandro Balde from injury, the story behind Fermín López and the solid friendship developed between Pedri and Ferran Torres.

trailers.title: 🍿 You can now see 𝗧𝗵𝗲 𝗡𝗲𝘅𝘁 𝗚𝗲𝗻𝗲𝗿𝗮𝘁𝗶𝗼𝗻. Episode 𝟭📺 Only on Barça One: http://barca.link/YlMb50ToxTR
